name: Moo Goo Gai Pan
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz) water chestnuts, halved lengthwise and drained
1 cup Fresh pea pods (Snow Peas), sliced crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the chicken and thinly slice into bite-sized strips.
2. In a small bowl, stir together water, soy sauce, dry sherry, cornstarch, honey, instant chicken granules; mix well.
3. Slice the drained water chestnuts; set aside.
4. Halve the pea pods crosswise; set aside.
5. Slice the mushrooms and green onions; set aside.
6. Grate 2 teaspoons gingerroot; set aside.
7. Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add chicken to wok and stir-fry for 3 to 4 minutes, then remove.
8. Add more oil if necessary and stir-fry water chestnuts, pea pods, mushrooms, green onions, and ginger for 3 to 4 minutes.
9. Return the chicken to the wok. Stir in the bouillon mixture and cook until thickened and bubbly, about 2 minutes.
10. This recipe serves 4 to 6.
